initialTests.label: A1c/glucose criteria plus ketones/acid-base if symptomatic.

source.source_section: Type 1 Diabetes Mellitus generated endocrine workup: diagnostic workup
source.implementation_notes: Generated from guideline-backed endocrine workup automation; schema, source, PHI, and regression tests run on 2026-06-06.

initialTests.action: Interpret with local lab ranges. Reference anchors: A1c: normal <5.7%; prediabetes 5.7-6.4%; diabetes >=6.5%. Fasting plasma glucose: normal <100 mg/dL; prediabetes 100-125; diabetes >=126. 2-hour 75-g OGTT: normal <140 mg/dL; prediabetes 140-199; diabetes >=200. Random plasma glucose >=200 mg/dL with classic symptoms supports diabetes diagnosis. DKA: diabetes/hyperglycemia plus ketosis plus metabolic acidosis; glucose may be lower in euglycemic DKA. DKA beta-hydroxybutyrate often >=3.0 mmol/L with pH <7.3 or bicarbonate <18 mmol/L.

initialTests.label: Beta-hydroxybutyrate, BMP, venous/arterial pH, bicarbonate, anion gap.

source.source_section: Type 1 Diabetes Mellitus generated endocrine workup: diagnostic workup

initialTests.action: Interpret with local lab ranges. Reference anchors: A1c: normal <5.7%; prediabetes 5.7-6.4%; diabetes >=6.5%. Fasting plasma glucose: normal <100 mg/dL; prediabetes 100-125; diabetes >=126. 2-hour 75-g OGTT: normal <140 mg/dL; prediabetes 140-199; diabetes >=200. Random plasma glucose >=200 mg/dL with classic symptoms supports diabetes diagnosis. DKA: diabetes/hyperglycemia plus ketosis plus metabolic acidosis; glucose may be lower in euglycemic DKA. DKA beta-hydroxybutyrate often >=3.0 mmol/L with pH <7.3 or bicarbonate <18 mmol/L.

initialTests.label: Islet autoantibodies: GAD65, IA-2, ZnT8, insulin Ab if needed; C-peptide with concurrent glucose.

reference_values: Fasting plasma glucose: normal <100 mg/dL; prediabetes 100-125; diabetes >=126.
Random plasma glucose >=200 mg/dL with classic symptoms supports diabetes diagnosis.
DKA: diabetes/hyperglycemia plus ketosis plus metabolic acidosis; glucose may be lower in euglycemic DKA.
DKA beta-hydroxybutyrate often >=3.0 mmol/L with pH <7.3 or bicarbonate <18 mmol/L.
